attributes.description: Alerts when disk write bytes exceed a threshold over the lookback window, indicating high instance-store or hypervisor-view write I/O demand.
attributes.name: [AWS EC2 OTel] High disk write throughput

esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-awscloudwatchreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE attributes.Namespace == "AWS/EC2"
    AND attributes.MetricName == "DiskWriteBytes"
    AND attributes.stat == "Sum"
| EVAL ec2_instance = CONCAT(attributes.InstanceId, " (", resource.attributes.cloud.region, ")")
| STATS total_write_bytes = SUM(`metrics.amazonaws.com/AWS/EC2/DiskWriteBytes`) BY ec2_instance
// Bytes threshold: tune per instance size and workload — Sum stat is bytes per CloudWatch period
| WHERE total_write_bytes > 536870912
| SORT total_write_bytes DESC
| LIMIT 100
